name: domain-architecture
description: Domain modeling and architecture workflow plugin for business software systems.

interface.shortDescription: Domain modeling and architecture workflow skills
interface.longDescription: A business-domain architecture plugin that coordinates domain modeling, source-aware architecture guidance, and optional jfoundry implementation guidance without depending on any external workflow plugin.
defaultPrompt: Guide this business-domain design from requirements to architecture decisions.
Model this workflow into commands, events, aggregates, and invariants.
Review this domain architecture for DDD, Hexagonal, Onion, and CQRS fit.
